creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
http://artifact.ci-dev.freebsd.org and https://artifact.ci.freebsd.org is intended open to the public for download the artifact built from the CI system for further testing.  (See https://ci.freebsd.org , there is " Artifacts are available at https://artifact.ci.freebsd.org")

Is there any other sensitive data shouldn't be publicly accessable?  If so, please mail jenkins-admin@ privately.  Thanks!
